name: Fahad Alhafidh
notes: Leading 85-year-old family business. 25 companies, 1,500+ employees. Main distributor for Panasonic, Midea, Electrolux, Samsung Signage, Hisense HVAC. Regional presence in UAE, Canada, Jordan, India, Germany.

name: Mohammed Ayad
notes: Founder of Dofied (2021), B2B payment platform for pharma & FMCG. Spoke at Baghdad Business School. Expanding to UAE. Abbott as client.

name: Taha Ayad
notes: Dr. Taha Ayad, founder of Saleem healthtech. Spoke at Baghdad Business School. Likely related to Mohammed Ayad (brothers?).

name: هاري استيبانيان
role: الباحث في شؤون الطاقة ومؤسس مركز العراق للتغير المناخي
